assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended support: 24 months vs 14 months for Regular channel'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention any cost implications or that Extended channel has additional charges

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: The response says Extended runs 2-3 versions behind Regular and features arrive 6-12 months later, but doesn't explain it gets the same versions just kept available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed features: New Kubernetes features arrive 6-12 months later' and 'Ecosystem lag' as drawbacks

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response includes the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel extended --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking available versions and notes that Extended typically runs 2-3 versions behind, implying 1.31 may not be available

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: While the response mentions benefits like stability and planning time, it doesn't specifically recommend Extended for compliance requirements or slow change processes

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: The response doesn't explicitly state that upgrades are still required within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention that minor version upgrades are not automated on Extended channel and must be manually initiated
